TrGatewayConfigurations.BCConfigurations:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_40-ea" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="com.fiorano.bc.trgateway.model.dmi.bcdk.BCDKConfigurationInfo"> 
  <void property="JCAAdapterConfig"> 
   <string><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ESBAdapterConfigurations>
    <ConnectionLess>false</ConnectionLess>
    <isConfigurationRequired>true</isConfigurationRequired>
    <isLicensed>false</isLicensed>
    <Inbound>false</Inbound>
    <AdapterInstanceProperties><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_40-ea" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.ESBAdapterInstanceProperties"> 
  <void property="GUID"> 
   <string>WebServiceConsumer</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="appName"> 
   <string>MOBILEBANKING_V3</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="domain"> 
   <string>BCConfigPropertySheet</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="instanceName"> 
   <string>WebServiceConsumer1</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="logCategories"> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>WSInvokerInteractionSpec</string> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.LogCategory"> 
     <void property="loggerDescription"> 
      <string>WSInvokerInteractionSpec</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerDisplayName"> 
      <string>WSInvokerInteractionSpec</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerLevel"> 
      <string>SEVERE</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerName"> 
      <string>com.fiorano.webservices.invoker.cci.WSInvokerInteractionSpec</string> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>WSInvokerManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.LogCategory"> 
     <void property="loggerDescription"> 
      <string>WSInvokerManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerDisplayName"> 
      <string>WSInvokerManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerLevel"> 
      <string>SEVERE</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerName"> 
      <string>com.fiorano.webservices.invoker.spi.outbound.WSInvokerManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></AdapterInstanceProperties>
    <ConfigurationObjects>
        <ConfigurationObject><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_40-ea" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.ConfigurationObject"> 
  <void property="beanClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.webservices.invoker.spi.outbound.WSInvokerManagedConnectionFactory</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="beanObject"> 
   <void property="JNDIName"> 
    <string>WebServiceConsumer</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="configuredVersion"> 
    <int>1100</int> 
   </void> 
   <void property="guid"> 
    <string>WebServiceConsumer</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="id"> 
    <string>MOBILEBANKING_V3__WebServiceConsumer1</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="wsdl"> 
    <object class="com.fiorano.webservices.invoker.model.WSDLInfo"> 
     <void property="wsdlURL"> 
      <string>http://192.168.103.106:8022/ws/statement.wsdl</string> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="configParams"> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsReconnection</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="description"> 
   <string>WSInvoker Connection</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="icon"> 
   <string>wsinvoker.png</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="implClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.webservices.invoker.spi.outbound.WSInvokerManagedConnectionFactory</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="name"> 
   <string>WebServiceConsumer</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="type"> 
   <string>javax.resource.spi.ManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></ConfigurationObject>

        <ConfigurationObject><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_40-ea" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.ConfigurationObject"> 
  <void property="beanClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.webservices.invoker.cci.WSInvokerInteractionSpec</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="beanObject"> 
   <void property="configuredVersion"> 
    <int>1200</int> 
   </void> 
   <void property="connectionConfiguration"> 
    <void property="password" isEncrypted="true"> 
     <string>zcC6SXzF+bh4BGN4YJKKfw==</string> 
    </void> 
   </void> 
   <void property="endpointAddress"> 
    <string>http://192.168.103.106:8022/ws</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="errorActionsMap"> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorActionsMap"> 
     <void property="errorActionsMap"> 
      <void method="put"> 
       <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error"> 
        <void property="errorID"> 
         <int>2</int> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
       <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorAction"> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>4</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.RetryErrorAction"> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>1</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorAction"> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>3</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
      </void> 
      <void method="put"> 
       <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error"> 
        <void property="errorID"> 
         <int>1</int> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
       <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorAction"> 
          <void property="active"> 
           <boolean>true</boolean> 
          </void> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>4</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.RetryErrorAction"> 
          <void property="active"> 
           <boolean>true</boolean> 
          </void> 
          <void property="noOfRetries"> 
           <int>10</int> 
          </void> 
          <void property="repeatInterval"> 
           <long>300000</long> 
          </void> 
          <void property="sendErrorAfterTries"> 
           <int>2</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
      </void> 
      <void method="put"> 
       <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error"> 
        <void property="errorID"> 
         <int>0</int> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
       <object class="java.util.ArrayList"/> 
      </void> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
   <void property="guid"> 
    <string>WebServiceConsumer</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="id"> 
    <string>MOBILEBANKING_V3__WebServiceConsumer1</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="jndiConfiguration"> 
    <void property="password" isEncrypted="true"> 
     <string>CVuEpOIpQJAIVeUQIs7kBQ==</string> 
    </void> 
   </void> 
   <void property="mimeHeaders"> 
    <object class="org.apache.axis.message.MimeHeaders"/> 
   </void> 
   <void property="operationInputParam"> 
    <string>GetStatementRequest</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="operationName"> 
    <string>GetStatement</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="operationOutputParam"> 
    <string>GetStatementResponse</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="portName"> 
    <string>StatementPortSoap11</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="properties"> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string>TargetNamespace.Prefix</string> 
     <string>tns</string> 
    </void> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string>javax.xml.rpc.soap.operation.style</string> 
     <string>document</string> 
    </void> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string>SOAP.version</string> 
     <string>http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/</string> 
    </void> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string>javax.xml.rpc.soap.http.soapaction.uri</string> 
     <string></string> 
    </void> 
   </void> 
   <void property="service"> 
    <string>{http://cpbank.com/statement}StatementPortService</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="soapBodyNS"> 
    <string>http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/</string> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="category"> 
   <string>WebService</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="configParams"> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsReconnection</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>enableScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>false</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsStudio</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="description"> 
   <string>WebService Invoker component</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="icon"> 
   <string>wsinvoker.png</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="implClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.webservices.invoker.cci.WSInvokerInteractionSpec</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="name"> 
   <string>WebServiceConsumer</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="type"> 
   <string>javax.resource.cci.InteractionSpec</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></ConfigurationObject>
    </ConfigurationObjects>
    <InputRecordDefinition><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_40-ea" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition"> 
  <void property="importedStructures"> 
   <object class="java.util.HashMap"> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string>http://cpbank.com/statement</string> 
     <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
      <void method="add"> 
       <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot;?&gt;&#13;
&lt;xs:schema elementFormDefault=&quot;qualified&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://cpbank.com/statement&quot; xmlns:sch=&quot;http://cpbank.com/statement&quot; xmlns:soap=&quot;http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/&quot; xmlns:stat=&quot;http://cpbank.com/statement&quot; xmlns:tns=&quot;http://cpbank.com/statement&quot; xmlns:wsdl=&quot;http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/&quot; xmlns:xs=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot;&gt;

    &lt;!-- GetStatementRequest --&gt;
    &lt;xs:element name=&quot;GetStatementRequest&quot;&gt;
        &lt;xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                &lt;xs:element name=&quot;username&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;xs:element name=&quot;password&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;xs:element name=&quot;accountNumber&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;fromDate&quot; type=&quot;stat:YYYYMMDDDate&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;toDate&quot; type=&quot;stat:YYYYMMDDDate&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
        &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
    &lt;/xs:element&gt;

    &lt;!-- GetStatementResponse --&gt;
    &lt;xs:element name=&quot;GetStatementResponse&quot;&gt;
        &lt;xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                &lt;xs:element name=&quot;status&quot; type=&quot;stat:statusType&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;transactions&quot; type=&quot;stat:transactionList&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
        &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
    &lt;/xs:element&gt;

    &lt;!-- Status Type with code and message --&gt;
    &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;statusType&quot;&gt;
        &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;xs:element name=&quot;code&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element name=&quot;message&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
        &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
    &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;

    &lt;!-- Date Format --&gt;
    &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;YYYYMMDDDate&quot;&gt;
        &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
            &lt;xs:pattern value=&quot;[0-9]{4}(0[1-9]|1[0-2])(0[1-9]|[12][0-9]|3[01])&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:length value=&quot;8&quot;/&gt;
        &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
    &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;

    &lt;!-- Transaction List --&gt;
    &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;transactionList&quot;&gt;
        &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;transaction&quot; type=&quot;stat:transaction&quot;/&gt;
        &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
    &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;

    &lt;!-- Transaction --&gt;
    &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;transaction&quot;&gt;
        &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;recid&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;bookingDate&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;reference&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;narrative&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;valueDate&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;drCr&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;amount&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;currency&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;description&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;txnType&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;debitAcc&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;creditAcc&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;acboCrAcc&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;acboCrName&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;acboDrName&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;acbiCrName&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;acbiDrName&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;bakongDesc&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;trxDt&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;trxTime&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;txnTypeDescription&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;cbsCrName&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;cbsDrName&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
        &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
    &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
&lt;/xs:schema&gt;</string> 
      </void> 
     </object> 
    </void> 
   </object> 
  </void> 
  <void property="rootElementName"> 
   <string>Envelope</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="structure"> 
   <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot;?&gt;&#13;
&lt;xsd:schema xmlns:wsdl=&quot;http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/&quot; xmlns:tns=&quot;http://cpbank.com/statement&quot; xmlns:sch=&quot;http://cpbank.com/statement&quot; xmlns:soap=&quot;http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/&quot; xmlns:ftns=&quot;http://cpbank.com/statement/GetStatement/Input&quot; xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://cpbank.com/statement/GetStatement/Input&quot;&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:import namespace=&quot;http://cpbank.com/statement&quot;/&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Envelope&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                &lt;xsd:element ref=&quot;ftns:Header&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                &lt;xsd:element ref=&quot;ftns:Body&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Header&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:sequence/&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Body&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                &lt;xsd:element ref=&quot;sch:GetStatementRequest&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;&#13;
</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="targetNamespace"> 
   <string>http://cpbank.com/statement/GetStatement/Input</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></InputRecordDefinition>
    <OutputRecordDefinition><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_40-ea" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition"> 
  <void property="importedStructures"> 
   <object class="java.util.HashMap"> 
    <void method="put"> 
     <string>http://cpbank.com/statement</string> 
     <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
      <void method="add"> 
       <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot;?&gt;&#13;
&lt;xs:schema elementFormDefault=&quot;qualified&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://cpbank.com/statement&quot; xmlns:sch=&quot;http://cpbank.com/statement&quot; xmlns:soap=&quot;http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/&quot; xmlns:stat=&quot;http://cpbank.com/statement&quot; xmlns:tns=&quot;http://cpbank.com/statement&quot; xmlns:wsdl=&quot;http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/&quot; xmlns:xs=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot;&gt;

    &lt;!-- GetStatementRequest --&gt;
    &lt;xs:element name=&quot;GetStatementRequest&quot;&gt;
        &lt;xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                &lt;xs:element name=&quot;username&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;xs:element name=&quot;password&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;xs:element name=&quot;accountNumber&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;fromDate&quot; type=&quot;stat:YYYYMMDDDate&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;toDate&quot; type=&quot;stat:YYYYMMDDDate&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
        &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
    &lt;/xs:element&gt;

    &lt;!-- GetStatementResponse --&gt;
    &lt;xs:element name=&quot;GetStatementResponse&quot;&gt;
        &lt;xs:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
                &lt;xs:element name=&quot;status&quot; type=&quot;stat:statusType&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;transactions&quot; type=&quot;stat:transactionList&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
        &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
    &lt;/xs:element&gt;

    &lt;!-- Status Type with code and message --&gt;
    &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;statusType&quot;&gt;
        &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;xs:element name=&quot;code&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element name=&quot;message&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
        &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
    &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;

    &lt;!-- Date Format --&gt;
    &lt;xs:simpleType name=&quot;YYYYMMDDDate&quot;&gt;
        &lt;xs:restriction base=&quot;xs:string&quot;&gt;
            &lt;xs:pattern value=&quot;[0-9]{4}(0[1-9]|1[0-2])(0[1-9]|[12][0-9]|3[01])&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:length value=&quot;8&quot;/&gt;
        &lt;/xs:restriction&gt;
    &lt;/xs:simpleType&gt;

    &lt;!-- Transaction List --&gt;
    &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;transactionList&quot;&gt;
        &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;xs:element maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;transaction&quot; type=&quot;stat:transaction&quot;/&gt;
        &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
    &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;

    &lt;!-- Transaction --&gt;
    &lt;xs:complexType name=&quot;transaction&quot;&gt;
        &lt;xs:sequence&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;recid&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;bookingDate&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;reference&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;narrative&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;valueDate&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;drCr&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;amount&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;currency&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;description&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;txnType&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;debitAcc&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;creditAcc&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;acboCrAcc&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;acboCrName&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;acboDrName&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;acbiCrName&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;acbiDrName&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;bakongDesc&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;trxDt&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;trxTime&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;txnTypeDescription&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;cbsCrName&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xs:element minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; name=&quot;cbsDrName&quot; type=&quot;xs:string&quot;/&gt;
        &lt;/xs:sequence&gt;
    &lt;/xs:complexType&gt;
&lt;/xs:schema&gt;</string> 
      </void> 
     </object> 
    </void> 
   </object> 
  </void> 
  <void property="rootElementName"> 
   <string>Envelope</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="structure"> 
   <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot;?&gt;&#13;
&lt;xsd:schema xmlns:wsdl=&quot;http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/&quot; xmlns:tns=&quot;http://cpbank.com/statement&quot; xmlns:sch=&quot;http://cpbank.com/statement&quot; xmlns:soap=&quot;http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/&quot; xmlns:ftns=&quot;http://cpbank.com/statement/GetStatement/Output&quot; xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://cpbank.com/statement/GetStatement/Output&quot;&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:import namespace=&quot;http://cpbank.com/statement&quot;/&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Envelope&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                &lt;xsd:element ref=&quot;ftns:Header&quot;/&gt;&#13;
                &lt;xsd:element ref=&quot;ftns:Body&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Header&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:sequence/&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Body&quot;&gt;&#13;
        &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
            &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
                &lt;xsd:element ref=&quot;sch:GetStatementResponse&quot;/&gt;&#13;
            &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;&#13;
        &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;&#13;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;&#13;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;&#13;
</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="targetNamespace"> 
   <string>http://cpbank.com/statement/GetStatement/Output</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></OutputRecordDefinition>
    <FaultRecordDefinition><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_40-ea" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition"> 
  <void property="rootElementName"> 
   <string>Error</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="structure"> 
   <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot; ?&gt;
&lt;xsd:schema xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/fault&quot; xmlns:tns=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/fault&quot; xmlns:soapenv=&quot;http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/&quot;&gt;
    &lt;xsd:import namespace=&quot;http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/&quot;/&gt;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Error&quot;&gt;
       &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;
          &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;errorCode&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;errorMessage&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;errorDetail&quot; type=&quot;tns:errorDetail&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;data&quot; type=&quot;tns:data&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;
          &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;
       &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;errorDetail&quot;&gt;
	  &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element ref=&quot;soapenv:Fault&quot;/&gt;
          &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;data&quot;&gt;
	  &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;
         &lt;xsd:any namespace=&quot;##any&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; processContents=&quot;lax&quot;/&gt;
      &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="targetNamespace"> 
   <string>http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/fault</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></FaultRecordDefinition>
</ESBAdapterConfigurations>
</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java>
